title: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model in a Claude-built CAD editor
summary: Claude Fable 5 designs a 3D-printable model within a browser-based CAD editor built by Fable 5 itself. The system includes an integrated AI copilot that performs the modeling tasks alongside the CAD interface.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 designing a 3D-printable model inside a browser-based CAD editor that Fable 5 itself built. The editor includes an integrated AI copilot that carries out the modeling tasks alongside the CAD interface. It demonstrates the model both generating the tool and operating within it as an agent, spanning code generation for the editor and the design work performed inside it.
